title: D-FantiX 24 Packs Coloured Pencils Bulk, 288 Count Pre-Sharpened Colouring Pencils Set, Back to School Gifts for Students, Elementary Classroom Kindergarten School Supplies for Kids Boys Girls

12 Vibrant Colours: The 12 coloured pencils set comes in a variety of rich and vibrant colours. Including Red, Orange, Yellow, Yellow Green, Green, Sky Blue, Blue, Purple, Pink, White, Black, Brown. Rich colours to meet the needs of creators

Pre-Sharpened Colour Pencils Set: Ready to use right out of the box, these art drawing supplies are pre-sharpened for your convenience and to save you time, allowing you to create detailed drawings and vivid illustrations with ease

Break-Resistant: Excellent quality thick cores against frustrating breakages during general use and sharpening. Premium refills allow painting to flow smoothly and easily. Good enough for long time use

Ideal Gift For Kids: Interesting package designs are more popular with kids. Each pack of coloured pencils 12 count comes in an individual box for easy distribution. Great present for birthday parties Halloween and Christmas, also perfect as art classroom supplies for teachers, aesthetic school supplies
description: Product Description The color pencils are made to be easy for children to hold and manipulate. Their lightweight and comfortable grip makes drawing a pleasant activity for little hands Bright, vivid, bold, and assorted colors, ultra-smooth, easy for color laydown and even coverage. They can inspire young artists to create colorful and fun pictures 288 premium colored pencils come in a pack of 24 boxes of 12 assorted colors each. Large quantity, the pencils are separated by individual boxes for easy organization and storage
